name: @mateicanavra/civ7-cli
description: CLI for managing Civilization VII modding resources.
author: Your Name

data.description: Work with Civilization VII data: crawl XML resources, explore relationships, zip outputs.

docs.description: Serve the project documentation site (Mintlify or Docsify) with optional syncing.

git:subtree.description: Configure remotes, import repos, pull, push, setup and view status via git subtree

game.description: Operate a running Civilization VII session through local tooling

game:local-data.description: Inspect local Civ7 SQLite, save, and log evidence

game:map.description: Read current world, plot, grid, start, and visibility map state

game:play:screen.description: Inspect and dismiss App UI display-queue screens (cinematic moments)

mod:git.description: Configure and sync mod repositories via git subtree (setup, import, pull, push, status, list, clear, remove, update)
